Subject: Quick Guide: How to Link Your Accounts for [League Name]

Hi Parents,

We’ve noticed a few families have separate accounts for their players. To make sure both parents or guardians receive league communications, schedules, and team updates, we recommend linking your accounts.

As an administrator, I cannot manually link two separate accounts, but you can easily add an **Additional Account Holder** by following these steps:

1. **Log in** to your primary Sports Connect account.
2. Click on the **gear icon** (Settings) in the top right corner of your dashboard.
3. Scroll down to the **Additional High School/Additional Account Holder** section at the bottom of the page.
4. Click **Add Additional Account Holder**.
5. Enter the name and email address of the second person and click **Send Invite**.

Once the second person accepts the invitation via email, they will be linked to the players on that account. This ensures you both stay in the loop for the upcoming season.

If you have already created two completely separate accounts with players on both, please let me know so we can help consolidate the records.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
Registrar, [League Name]
